title: The Once And Future Fable #5
whyItMatters: We, or at least ‘more than 100 American institutions,’ got Mythos back this week. What we the people do not have is Fable or Sol. While we wait for both Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6-Sol, today we instead got Claude Sonnet 5 . As usual it will take a few days to get a handle on the new model.
